## 🚀 Next Steps to Complete 100%

For the remaining 6 files, follow this simple 3-step process for EACH file:

### Step 1: Open File
Open one of the 6 remaining files

### Step 2: Find Auto-Generated Code
Search for: `@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")`
This marks the start of auto-generated block

### Step 3: Delete & Replace
- Delete entire block from `@SuppressWarnings` to `}//GEN-END:initComponents`
- Delete entire `// Variables declaration` section
- Replace with minimal initComponents:
```java
private void initComponents() {
    setLayout(null);
}
```

### Step 4: Test
- Build project (Ctrl+Shift+B)
- If no compile errors, done!
- All business logic still works

### Step 5: Repeat 5 More Times
Same process for all 6 remaining files

Each file will look like:
```java
public class ViewName extends JPanel {

        initComponents();

        setLayout(null);
    }
    
    // All business logic methods UNCHANGED

    private void save() { /* original code */ }

}
```
